title: More Mine
description: "More Minerals" is a Minecraft: Java Edition mod that introduces new ore types to the vanilla ore generation system.
body:
While fully preserving vanilla ore generation mechanics and interaction logic, "More Minerals" expands the survival experience through:

• Unified stylistic design: New ore variants maintain visual consistency with vanilla textures (e.g., silver ore adopts a grayish-white color scheme)

• Zero-destructive expansion:

  • Original tools (iron/diamond pickaxes) remain fully functional for mining

  • Furnace smelting retains vanilla 1:1 input/output ratios

  • Ore distribution strictly follows vanilla biome generation rules

Key Features

1. Seamless Integration

  • Hardness/explosion resistance gradients match vanilla ore tiers

  • Compatible with vanilla mob spawns and cave generation systems

2. Tool Compatibility

  • No new tool types required (existing pickaxes work for all ores)

  • Enchantment compatibility preserved (Fortune, Silk Touch)

3. Economic Expansion

  • Adds new smeltable ores with unique metal ingots

  • Includes decorative ore blocks for architectural use

Use Cases

  • Survival players: Expanded resource acquisition paths

  • Server admins: New economic system components

  • Builders: decorative ore variants with varied chromatic effects
And welcome to [watch my videos on Bilibili](https://space.bilibili.com/3546729347550029?spm_id_from=333.1007.0.0).
